name: gqhashrun
description: A small utility for running .hash scripts.

scripts.git: git add .; git commit -m "update"; echo gitted...
scripts.git:push: git push origin master & git push nodegit master & git push bitbucket master & echo pushed...
scripts.git:setup: git config --global user.name "username";git config --global user.email "username@gmail.com";git branch --set-upstream-to=origin/master master;
scripts.test:dl: npm run lint && npm run check && npm run testonly
scripts.test:ci: npm run lint && npm run check && npm run testonly -- --coverage
scripts.build: babel src --ignore src/__tests__ --out-dir dist/ ; cp src/index.js dist/index.js.flow ; cp src/index.d.ts dist/
